rulings.Case Title: CAPURRO PROPERTIES LLC VS. GENE BAKER
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 3, 2009, line 7, PLAINTIFF CAPURRO PROPERTIES LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Hearing continued to November 13, 2009. (CCP sec. 437c(h)) written opposition filed and personally served by November 9, 2009. Written reply filed and personally served by November 12, 2009 at noon. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: 1900 EDDY STREET LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. FATON BINAKU et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 3, 2009, line 8, DEFENDANT FATON BINAKU MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Motion to strike sustained as to second prayer for damages for each day defendants remain in possession of workshop after September 30, 2009. Also, since the leave provides that parking and workshop are not considered for any portion of the base rent, there is no discernable reasonable rental value for the workshop. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: 1900 EDDY STREET LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. FATON BINAKU et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 3, 2009, line 8, DEFENDANT FATON BINAKU DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled, five days leave to answer. Complaint certain as to area described, nuisance, and alleged breach. Factual issues raised not subject to demurrer. =(302/CWW)
